pending_checkpoint.description: Kip Madden reviews prism_formal_spec.md and resolves all 7 flags (F1-F7) before P1-T2 is dispatched. Without flag resolution, P1-T2 cannot produce a parameter-free derivation.
required_actions: Resolve Flag F1: Is compact dimension χ spacelike?
Resolve Flag F2: Supply explicit relation L_χ = f(α)
Resolve Flag F3: Supply spiral growth rate k in terms of α; select χ-θ coupling form (A, B, or C)
Resolve Flag F4: Confirm or correct the embedding map θ ↦ (x¹, x², x³, χ)
Resolve Flag F5: Is k = α directly, or k = f(α)? Supply justification.
Resolve Flag F6: Confirm s-state coupling mechanism must emerge from derivation, not be postulated.
Resolve Flag F7: Is φ postulated or emergent?
Supply or point to kip_madden_prism_notes.md and/or prism_framework_v7.0.4_draft.md
Explicit APPROVE or REVISE decision on prism_formal_spec.md before P1-T2 dispatch

notes: P1-T1 complete. HALTED at CP1 per spec §11. Kip must resolve 7 flags in prism_formal_spec.md before P1-T2 dispatch. Primary framework notes files were not found on disk — this is the main blocker. Run /prism-checkpoint approve (with flag resolutions supplied) to unblock.
